gist.headline: Dreaming in single-file HTML
gist.blurb: Dreamframe just landed in the Greenhouse! It's a zero-dependency, single-HTML-file playground that lets you generate images, video, voice, and music all from one cozy interface.
gist.summary: Added Dreamframe, a zero-dependency single-HTML-file playground for the Pollinations API, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now experiment with image, video, voice, and music generation all from a single, lightweight interface.
gist.visual_concept: A literal glowing picture frame (Dreamframe) showing different media types (music notes, video film, images). Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot interacting with it in a greenhouse setting, representing the app's addition to GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor-head robot admiring a glowing magical picture frame resting in a lush digital greenhouse. The frame emits swirling musical notes, tiny video reels, and colorful pixels. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
